title: Define Wave 17 manager property mutation contract and state map
description: Extend architecture docs with manager property action contracts (reserve/release/status change), role constraints, and deterministic mobile state transitions.
acceptance_criteria: Mutation API contract is explicit for reserve, release, and status update actions
Role scope and ownership rules are documented for manager/admin mutation flows
UI state map defines pending/success/conflict/forbidden/session-expired transitions for manager actions
